sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνδραποδιστής

- Transliteration: Andrapodistes

- Phonetic: an-drap-od-is-tace'

- Definition:

1. a slave-dealer, kidnapper, man-stealer

a. of one who unjustly reduces free men to slavery

b. of one who steals the slaves of others and sells them

- Origin: from a derivative of a compound of G435 and G4228

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From a derivative of a compound of G435 and G4228; an enslaver (as bringing men to his feet): - men-stealer.
